user_tasks.statement: Which datasets describe HVAC equipment in building X?
Which datasets contain sensor measurements for a given building zone?
Which IFC schema version does a BIM dataset conform to?
Which datasets reference a specific AAS submodel or semantic ID?
Which datasets can be reused under an open license for facility-management analytics?
Which lifecycle phase (design, construction, operation) does a dataset cover?
Find all datasets published by a given contractor for a given project.
Assess whether a dataset is fit for energy-performance simulation before downloading it.
